proposed_definition: An s followed by another consonant (st, sp, sc, sb, sg, sf, sm, sn, ...), as in studente or sport. In the masculine it triggers the lo / uno / gli forms of the article, like z, gn, ps, x and y.
rationale: Used across the article forms explanations (lo studente, uno sport, gli studenti). A tooltip would help A1 learners who don't yet have the term; the concept is the trigger for the whole masculine-impure-s article family.
